description: Executes the capability compiler (node dist/cli.js compile) against a worksheet.yaml. Emits definition.json, definition.hash, meta.json, test.fixture.json, and test.spec.ts. Does not modify capability_snapshot.json. Does not whitelist in the membrane. Compilation is the transition from YAML worksheet to registry artifact.

idempotency_key.description: Stable key for replay-safe compilation. Bind capability_id, version, nested_version, and out_dir.

nested_version.description: Whether to emit under capabilities/<cap>/<version>/ layout. Defaults to false.

out_dir.description: Output directory for compiled artifacts. Defaults to ../capabilities.
